event_notes: Source venue label preserved during 2026-03-18 Wave 2 venue canonicalization: Middle, Fisk State Park.
event_comments:
See the 2024 PNWOF Day 3 results for links to WinSplits, Livelox, Attackpoint, and RouteGadget, as well as a complete list of volunteers.
Result status codes: MSP = missing punch; DNF = did not finish; NC = not competing; DQ = disqualified; OVT = overtime; DNS = did not start.
Source note: a starred time indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, MSP, or DNF.
